title: Floral Gooey Dumpling Soup
description: A warm and comforting dumpling soup with a floral twist that's perfect for sick days or as a light meal. Vegan-friendly and jain-friendly option featuring ingredients like water, agar-agar, and dumplings.

ingredients.name: 30g agar-agar flakes
ingredients.notes: Soak in hot water for 15 minutes

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Boil and then strain through a cheesecloth to remove solids

ingredients.name: Floral-infused water (rosewater or lavender, 1 tablespoon each)
ingredients.notes: Infuse in hot water for at least an hour

instructions: Place agar-agar flakes in a small bowl and soak them in hot water for about 15 minutes. Squeeze out excess water.
In a large pot, combine the soaked agar-agar with floral-infused water (rosewater or lavender), salt to taste, and strained water from soaking the agar-agar.
